blocks.text: had already noted the room assignment. He would remember it.

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: I'm going to go shower. Get the salt out.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: I'll come up in a bit.

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: Take your time. I'll be a while.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Classic Sophie shower. Forty-five minutes minimum.

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: It takes time to undo what the ocean does to your hair.

blocks.speaker: Nadia Reyes
blocks.content: I might take a walk. Clear my head before dinner.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Don't go too far. We're eating at seven.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: Marcus, I need to talk to you. Now's a good time.
Five people. Five different directions. The afternoon had opened like a hand releasing something.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: What do you want to do?

blocks.prompt: Everyone just separated. What does Julian track?

options.label: Where Cade and Marcus went to talk.
Nothing. He goes back with Mara.
